name: Amaretto Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix graham cracker crumbs, cinnamon, sugar and butter. Press mixture into the bottom of a 9 inch spring form pan.
2. Beat cream cheese until light and fluffy. Gradually beat in 1 cup sugar. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Pour batter into the prepared pan and bake in a pre-heated oven set to 375°F for 45-50 minutes.
4. Mix sour cream, sugar and amaretto. Spoon the mixture over the cheesecake when done and return it to the oven briefly at a higher temperature. Let rest for 5 minutes before cooling completely.
5. Refrigerate for 48 hours before serving. Top with sliced toasted almonds and chocolate curls.
